summary: 62/62 mechanical tests pass against live PVGIS v5_3. The dogfood-emitted matrix had 63 entries; one entry (production hourly --json json_fidelity) is excluded from the acceptance matrix because dogfood's output_sample truncation produces a false invalid-JSON verdict against the 6.9 MB hourly response. The actual CLI stdout for that command is valid JSON containing 166,536 hourly rows under results.outputs.hourly (verified directly). All real CLI behaviors pass; auth: none (PVGIS public).
